hooks.command: bash -c 'result=$(ls -dt "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-result-speak-cat/claude-result-speak-cat"/*/  2>/dev/null | head -1); r="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -z "$r" ] && r="${result%/}"; [ -n "$r" ] && exec "$r/scripts/pet-notify.sh" complete'

bash -c 'result=$(ls -dt "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-result-speak-cat/claude-result-speak-cat"/*/  2>/dev/null | head -1); r="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -z "$r" ] && r="${result%/}"; [ -n "$r" ] && exec "$r/scripts/pet-notify.sh" permission'

bash -c 'result=$(ls -dt "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-result-speak-cat/claude-result-speak-cat"/*/  2>/dev/null | head -1); r="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -z "$r" ] && r="${result%/}"; [ -n "$r" ] && exec "$r/scripts/pet-notify.sh" idle'
